title: Giants
description:
In this game, you’re sent to a high-rise apartment complex as an insurance agent. Your colleague couldn’t make it in time, and no one has told you exactly what’s going on. But you have your camera with you, so you can start documenting everything for your upcoming report.

In Giants, you’ll experience the tragic story of the residents of the 8th floor: 

• The story isn’t told through words, but through the setting, the objects, and the atmosphere.

• In the seven apartments on the 8th floor, you’ll encounter a wide variety of characters.

• Giants is a walking simulator with puzzle elements.

• All assets have been handcrafted specifically for Giants.

The PlaceThe hallways of the high-rise feel unsettling. The walls are thin, and it’s hard not to hear what’s going on in the neighboring apartment. Although it’s never truly quiet, it’s not a place that’s bursting with life. Loneliness, anonymity, and a lack of prospects define life. The atmosphere is oppressive. It’s actually hard to imagine that people live here.
description_short: Giants is a first-person narrative game that tells the tragic story of the residents of the 8th floor. The company has sent you here to investigate certain incidents for insurance purposes. Explore the building and the residents' apartments.
